title: Update to container-libs main
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Moves our main branch onto container-libs main:
* go get go.podman.io/storage@main go.podman.io/image/v5@main go.podman.io/common@main
* make vendor-in-container

#### How to verify it

No new tests.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Should unblock #6899.

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
